title: Benchmarking Path
description: Build fluency in Benchmarking inside Natural Language Processing by moving from foundational terms into adjacent methods, variants, and extensions.

steps.title: MMLU
steps.summary: MMLU belongs to the Natural Language Processing area of AI/ML, within Benchmarking. It sits inside Natural Language Processing / Benchmarking. Compare it with HellaSwag and GLUE & SuperGLUE. It opens into MMLU-Med and MMLU Benchmark.
steps.whyIncluded: Start here to anchor the vocabulary and core intuition for this area.

steps.title: GLUE & SuperGLUE
steps.summary: GLUE & SuperGLUE belongs to the Natural Language Processing area of AI/ML, within Benchmarking. It sits inside Natural Language Processing / Benchmarking. Start after GLUE and SuperGLUE.
steps.whyIncluded: Use this after the foundations to connect patterns, variants, and system behavior.

steps.title: HellaSwag
steps.summary: HellaSwag belongs to the Natural Language Processing area of AI/ML, within Benchmarking. It sits inside Natural Language Processing / Benchmarking. Compare it with MMLU and GLUE & SuperGLUE. It opens into HELLASWAG Benchmark.
steps.whyIncluded: Treat this as an advanced extension once the earlier terms feel natural.
